creator: scottl@FreeBSD.org
text: Hi.  mount_udf and the udf kernel code was originally my baby, but I did some very naive things in it that worked for mainstream DVD-ROM media but were not fully compliant with the spec.  I can work on this for a few evenings, but I don't have a way to easily create a DVD-RAM test case.  Would it work to do a 'dd' image of your test disk and make it available to me to download?  That might help to accelerate my efforts on this.
